# Retro8 UI

> Retro8 UI is a framework-agnostic retro 8-bit UI library shipped as compiled CSS, an optional JavaScript runtime, and semantic `r8-*` classes.

## Overview

- [Documentation Home (EN)](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en): Main entry point for the English docs.
- [Documentation Home (PT-BR)](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/pt-br): Main entry point for the Portuguese docs.
- [Quick Start](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/getting-started): Installation and basic consumption flow.
- [Component Catalog](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components): Grouped component index.
- [Tokens](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/tokens): Foundation tokens and visual system.
- [Icons](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/icons): Recommended icon pairing.
- [llms.txt Guide Page](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/llms.txt): Human-facing guide for this file.
- [Skills Guide (EN)](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/skills): AI skills guide for documentation workflows.
- [Skills Guide (PT-BR)](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/pt-br/skills): Versao em portugues do guia de skills.

## Components

- [Button](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/button): Component documentation.
- [Border](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/border): Component documentation.
- [Color](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/color): Component documentation.
- [Layout Container](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/layout-container): Component documentation.
- [Icon](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/icon): Component documentation.
- [Link](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/link): Component documentation.
- [Splitter](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/splitter): Component documentation.
- [Typography](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/typography): Component documentation.
- [Config Provider](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/config-provider): Component documentation.
- [Autocomplete](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/autocomplete): Component documentation.
- [Cascader](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/cascader): Component documentation.
- [Checkbox](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/checkbox): Component documentation.
- [Color Picker](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/color-picker): Component documentation.
- [Date Picker](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/date-picker): Component documentation.
- [Datetime Picker](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/datetime-picker): Component documentation.
- [Form](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/form): Component documentation.
- [Input](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/input): Component documentation.
- [Input OTP](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/input-otp): Component documentation.
- [Input Number](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/input-number): Component documentation.
- [Input Tag](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/input-tag): Component documentation.
- [Radio](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/radio): Component documentation.
- [Rate](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/rate): Component documentation.
- [Select](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/select): Component documentation.
- [Slider](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/slider): Component documentation.
- [Switch](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/switch): Component documentation.
- [Theme Switch](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/theme-switch): Component documentation.
- [Transfer](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/transfer): Component documentation.
- [Upload](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/upload): Component documentation.
- [Avatar](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/avatar): Component documentation.
- [Badge](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/badge): Component documentation.
- [Card](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/card): Component documentation.
- [Carousel](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/carousel): Component documentation.
- [Collapse](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/collapse): Component documentation.
- [Empty](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/empty): Component documentation.
- [Image](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/image): Component documentation.
- [Pagination](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/pagination): Component documentation.
- [Progress](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/progress): Component documentation.
- [Skeleton](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/skeleton): Component documentation.
- [Table](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/table): Component documentation.
- [Tag](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/tag): Component documentation.
- [Breadcrumb](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/breadcrumb): Component documentation.
- [Dropdown](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/dropdown): Component documentation.
- [Steps](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/steps): Component documentation.
- [Tabs](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/tabs): Component documentation.
- [Alert](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/alert): Component documentation.
- [Dialog](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/dialog): Component documentation.
- [Drawer](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/drawer): Component documentation.
- [Loading](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/loading): Component documentation.
- [Poptip](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/poptip): Component documentation.
- [Divider](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/divider): Component documentation.
- [Watermark](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/watermark): Component documentation.
- [Panel](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/panel): Component documentation.
- [Window](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/window): Component documentation.
- [Navbar](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/navbar): Component documentation.
- [Inventory Page](https://regiszaum.github.io/retro8-ui/en/components/inventory-page): Component documentation.

## Project Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/regiszaum/retro8-ui): Source code and issues.
- [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/retro8-ui): Published package details.
